data.title: UNI price may hit $5.37 critical support, eyeing $7.88 target by Jan 2025. Oversold conditions hint at rebound.
data.description: Latest analysis on the UNI price indicates a crucial support level of $5.37, followed by a possible rebound towards a target of $7.88. Technical assessment suggests the market is currently oversold, which could pave the way for a potential recovery.

data.title: LINK predicted to reach $20.50 by Dec 2025, facing resistance at $14.50 in the near term. 50% potential upside projected.
data.description: According to recent price forecasts, Chainlink's LINK token could see a substantial 50% increase to reach $20.50 by December 2025. However, investors should be cautious as there is strong resistance at $14.50 currently, presenting a challenge for those bullish on Chainlink.

data.title: AVAX may hit $16-19 in 30 days with 20-43% increase despite current weakness, signals show oversold conditions.
data.description: The price forecast for AVAX suggests a possible increase of 20-43% to reach a range of $16-19 in the next 30 days. This prediction is based on oversold conditions indicated by technical indicators and the emergence of bullish MACD momentum.

data.title: Firm secures $1.44B amidst crypto downturn to ease investor concerns, with CEO mentioning extending dividend runway in 8 days.
data.description: Phong Le, the CEO of Strategy, revealed that his company was able to secure enough funds to cover 21 months' worth of dividends in a remarkable time span of only eight days. This proactive measure was taken to address concerns among investors and ensure stability within the firm.

data.title: Netflix acquired Warner Bros Discovery for $82.7 billion, focusing on AI and chips, not just movies. Otto says it involves Google's TPU chips in the future of entertainment.
data.description: The $82.7 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery by Netflix Inc. is not just about movies and shows, as stated by Melissa Otto from S&P Global Visible Alpha. The deal also focuses on artificial intelligence and chips. The impact of Alphabet Inc.'s technology ambitions, especially Google's TPU Chips, plays a significant role in shaping the future of entertainment. Otto highlighted that the key question revolves around the control of premium video on a large scale, with generative AI being used to create and personalize moving images. The full report is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: DOT price could surge to $2.75-$3.30 by Jan 2026. Technical analysis indicates a bounce from oversold levels with $1.96 support.
data.description: According to technical analysis, DOT is currently oversold and may see a bounce soon. There is a possibility that it could reach a resistance zone of $2.75-$3.30 in the next 4-6 weeks. It is crucial to note that the critical support level for DOT stands at $1.96.

data.title: Polygon (MATIC) set to rebound to $0.45, defying bearish trends - forecasted for December 2025. Support at $0.35 remains strong.
data.description: Analysts are forecasting a potential rebound for MATIC in the next 4-6 weeks, with the price expected to reach $0.45. Despite the current bearish trend, the crucial support level at $0.35 is expected to remain strong in the short term.

data.description: The most recent forecast for DOGE suggests that Dogecoin is on track to surpass the $0.165 resistance level, with technical analysis indicating potential targets of $0.17 to $0.22 in the upcoming 2 to 4 weeks.

data.title: XRP expected to reach $2.31 soon, possible rally to $2.85 by end of year; analysts predict potential upside if key resistance breaks.

data.description: Analysts are forecasting a positive trend for BNB, predicting a price surge towards the range of $1,100 to $1,150 over the next month. The crucial support level for BNB is expected to stay around $900 to $920.

data.title: ETH may hit $4,200 by Jan 2025, with a possible rally to $7,500. Despite weakness below key averages, bullish momentum is growing.

Despite facing current challenges below important moving averages, a bullish trend is being observed, indicating a potential upward movement in the price of ETH in the coming years.

data.title: Bitcoin is expected to reach $96k-$98k by end of 2025. Technical analysis hints at short-term rise to $96k-$98k with $80,600 support intact.
data.description: According to recent Bitcoin technical analysis, there is potential for a rebound towards $96,000 to $98,000 within the next 2 to 4 weeks. The critical support level stands at $80,600, indicating a strong foundation. Additionally, there is a bullish MACD momentum that is currently in the process of building up.

data.title: Bernie Sanders and Pope Leo XIV call for ethical AI development to prevent concentrating wealth and power in Big Tech.
data.description: Sen. Bernie Sanders echoed Pope Leo XIV's call for ethical AI development at the "Artificial Intelligence and Care of Our Common Home" conference. Pope Leo emphasized human dignity lies in reflection, free choice, unconditional love, and authentic relationships. He warned against becoming passive consumers of AI content, stressing the need for humans to be co-workers in creation. The conference was organized by the Centesimus Annus Pro Pontifice Foundation and the Catholic Research Universities Alliance. Leo highlighted the importance of protecting these qualities to manage the societal and ethical impacts of AI. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: After the fatal Hong Kong fire, numerous survivors are stranded. The city faces a challenge in aiding thousands affected.
data.description: Hong Kong, known for having some of the highest housing costs and levels of inequality globally, is now faced with the challenge of supporting thousands of its residents who have been affected by loss of friends, family, and homes.

data.title: Netflix's $82.7B acquisition of Warner Bros leads to backlash from Elizabeth Warren warning of price hikes and less choices in entertainment industry.
data.description: Netflix's $82.7 billion plan to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery has sparked concerns in Washington and Hollywood. Senator Elizabeth Warren criticized the merger, warning it could lead to higher prices and limited choices for consumers. She argued that the deal would create a streaming giant controlling nearly half of all subscribers, potentially raising prices and threatening American jobs. Warren also called for a fair and transparent antitrust review of the deal. The acquisition would impact popular shows like White Lotus, Game of Thrones, and Stranger Things. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: 2,000 Bitcoin from rare Casascius coins in motion after 13 years, acquired when Bitcoin was worth $3.88 and $11.69 each. Massive potential profit.
data.description: Physical Bitcoin collectibles were produced at the time when Bitcoin was valued at $3.88 and $11.69 each, representing a significant potential profit.

data.title: Carvana, Comfort Systems, CRH to join S&P 500 index on Dec. 22, causing their stocks to rise; Vertiv and SoFi snubbed.
data.description: Carvana, Comfort Systems, and CRH experienced significant spikes in their stock prices after the announcement that they will be included in the S&P 500 index starting December 22. This news led to strong market reactions, with investors showing particular interest in these companies as they move into this widely tracked index. However, Vertiv and SoFi did not make the cut, surprising some market observers. The additions of Carvana, Comfort Systems, and CRH to the S&P 500 index have generated positive momentum and excitement in the investment community.

data.title: Former Louisiana Attorney General Charles C. Foti, Jr., investigates ZoomInfo Technologies, Inc. Officers and Directors. ($GTM)
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Charles C. Foti, Jr., former Attorney General of Louisiana and current partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, revealed an inquiry being launched by the firm into ZoomInfo Technologies, Inc. (NasdaqGS: GTM).
